pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 52: post_data(NODE_NAME, {"power": val}); task description specifies 'Target Input: Node garage_solar, Input power'
task description: 'Log the corrected real-time power to a new PHPFina feed named solar_yield'; verifier.py line 63 checks for process_id==1 with target=='solar_yield'
task description: 'Log the cumulative energy to a new PHPFina feed named solar_energy'; verifier.py line 68 checks for process_id==4 or 5 with target=='solar_energy'
task description: 'multiply by -1'; verifier.py line 58 checks for process_id==2 with target='-1'; GitHub emoncms/emoncms process_processlist.php confirms process 2 is multiply operation

privileged_info_summary: The task involves correcting reversed polarity in a solar PV sensor simulation using Emoncms (OpenEnergyMonitor). The target node is 'garage_solar' with input 'power'. The solution requires: (1) configuring a Scale process (process ID 2) with factor -1 to invert negative values, (2) adding a Log to feed process (process ID 1) to record corrected power to 'solar_yield' feed, and (3) adding a Power to kWh process (process ID 4 or 5) to accumulate energy into 'solar_energy' feed. The processing order must be: Scale → Log → Accumulate. Data is synthetic, generated by simulate_reversed_sensor.py which produces random negative values (−1000 to −3000W) to simulate a reversed current transformer installation.
